name: Creamy Chile Dip
recipeIngredient: 1.1 oz Hidden Valley Ranch Party Dip Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sour cream, diced green chilies, and Hidden Valley Ranch Party Dip Mix in a bowl.
2. Stir until well blended.
3. Chill for at least 1 hour to allow flavors to meld together.
4. Makes approximately 2 1/3 cups.
